name: German Payslip
description: German Lohn-/Gehaltsabrechnung. Detects Steuerident-Nr., Rentenversicherungs-Nr., Krankenversicherungs-Nr., IBAN, German dates and phone numbers, plus names, addresses. Disables the noisy 'Amounts' detector.

patterns.name: Rentenversicherungsnummer
patterns.description: German pension insurance number (8 digits + 1 uppercase letter + 3 digits)

patterns.name: Krankenversicherungsnummer
patterns.description: German health insurance number (1 uppercase letter + 9 digits)

patterns.name: IBAN
patterns.description: International Bank Account Number — supports spaces between groups

patterns.name: German phone number
patterns.description: German phone numbers — bounded to avoid matching inside longer numbers
